curation_notes: Patch commit d26b2a6 identified from advisory reference link. The commit bundles multiple security fixes across 7 files (6 non-test source files), making it a noisy patch; only htdocs/admin/menus/edit.php is relevant to the SQL injection. The fix replaces raw $_POST['menuId'] with GETPOST('menuId','int') which sanitizes the input as an integer. The unsanitized menuId was passed to Menubase::fetch() which directly interpolates it into a SQL WHERE clause. Sibling files index.php and other.php in the same directory already used GETPOST() with type filtering and are not vulnerable. Vulnerability class sql-injection confirmed from CWE-89, the advisory description, and the patch diff.
